release_notes.de:
Version 0.3.7.0 - TipTap Editor Integration.
- 📝 Neu: TipTap Editor (Beta) als alternative Editor-Engine integriert.
- 🚀 Neu: Editor-Architektur refaktorisiert (EditorManager Plugin-System).
- ✨ Neu: TipTap Lore-Highlighting Extension hinzugefügt (markiert Lore-Begriffe live in orange während des Tippens).
- 🎨 Neu: Native Custom Toolbar für TipTap (Fett, Kursiv, Überschriften, Listen).
release_notes.en:
Version 0.3.7.0 - TipTap Editor Integration.
- 📝 New: TipTap Editor (Beta) integrated as an alternative editor engine.
- 🚀 New: Refactored Editor Architecture using EditorManager plugin system.
- ✨ New: Added TipTap Lore-Highlighting Extension (highlights lore keywords live in orange while typing).
- 🎨 New: Native Custom Toolbar for TipTap (Bold, Italic, Headings, Lists).
